name: Sleepover on the Astral Express || Honkai Star Rail
description:
Pom-Pom invites all of your buddies to a sleepover on the Astral Express, and chaos surely ensues…

—————————

I took off most of the irrelevant characters so I could focus on my (and probably your) favorites. Dw, Aventurine and Ratio are still here. I’ll list the characters included below Tags.

—————————

⚠️ Trigger Warning ⚠️

Possible sex scenes (depends), sleepovers, social interactions, gambling, gaming, drunk singing, possibly touching grass, gingers

who is grass and why people want me to touch them 😭🥀
